pokemon:tinkaton.name: Tinkaton
pokemon:tinkaton.summary: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.
The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.

pokemon:tinkatuff.name: Tinkatuff
pokemon:tinkatuff.summary: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.
These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.

pokemon:tinkatink.name: Tinkatink
pokemon:tinkatink.summary: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.
This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.
